description:
You are a Geothermal Production Manager using ProjectLibre. In the 'Enterprise Software Development Project', add a new work resource to the project's resource pool with the following details:

- Name: Helena Torres
- Type: Work
- Initials: HT
- Group: Engineering
- Max Units: 100%
- Standard Rate: 110.00/hr
- Overtime Rate: 165.00/hr

Save the updated project, containing both the original resources and the new entry, as a Microsoft Project XML file to /home/ga/Projects/updated_project.xml.
